result.summary: Box exposes a REST API at https://api.box.com/2.0 with OAuth 2.0, client-credentials, and developer-token access, plus a hosted MCP server at https://mcp.box.com that uses OAuth; the legacy self-hosted MCP path is deprecated/unknown.

box_oauth_app.label: Box OAuth 2.0 app
box_oauth_app.setup: Go to the [Developer Console](https://app.box.com/developers/console), create a **Platform App**, and choose **OAuth 2.0** as the app type. Configure a **Redirect URI** and the needed scopes before using the app to mint access tokens.

box_client_credentials_app.label: Box Client Credentials app
box_client_credentials_app.setup: Open the [Developer Console](https://app.box.com/developers/console), create a **Platform App**, and choose **Client Credentials Grant**. A Box admin or co-admin must authorize the app unless you are using a free developer account.

box_developer_token.label: Box developer token
box_developer_token.setup: Sign up for a free Box developer account at [Get started for free](https://account.box.com/signup/developer#ty9l3), then use the Developer Console to generate a short-lived developer token for quick testing.
